---
name: Integration request
about: Propose or discuss a downstream tool, portal, assistant, or workflow integration
title: "Integration: "
labels: ["integration"]
---

## Integration

What tool, portal, assistant, workflow project, or downstream system should
consume HPC Skill Hub?

## Use Case

Who would use this integration, and what should it help them do?

## Registry Surface

- [ ] `registry/index.json`
- [ ] `schemas/*.schema.json`
- [ ] `tools/hpc_skill.py --json`
- [ ] Skill README or examples
- [ ] Collections
- [ ] Site adapters

## Required Metadata

Which fields, filters, links, or outputs does the integration need?

## Safety And User Intent

How will the integration show risk, maturity, site assumptions, and require
explicit user intent before running commands?

## Compatibility

Would this require a schema, CLI, generated index, or governance change?

## Public References

Link public documentation, prototypes, or related tools.

## Safety And Privacy Check

- [ ] This request uses public information only.
- [ ] No usernames, tokens, allocation names, private hostnames, internal
      project identifiers, unpublished cluster policy, or private dataset paths
      are included.
